title: Smooth Particles
description: Adds the functionality to spawn particles when you place a block
body:
This mod adds the functionality to spawn particles when you place a block allowing a much smoother experience

Requires Fabric API and Fabric loader

This mod works on the client side which means you can play all your favorite servers with it

This likely won't be updated for newer versions. However, enchanted-games has made a very similar mod that is being updated. Go check them out at https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-interactions



For questions ask me on discord at watermalone1#0001 or on GitHub by submitting an issue

Check it out on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-particles)
